name: body-muscles
description: Interactive SVG body map with 70+ muscles, intensity visualization, and zero dependencies. Works with React, Vue, Svelte, or vanilla JS.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --module esnext --outDir dist/esm && node scripts/fix-esm-imports.js && node scripts/build-umd.js
scripts.docs: rm -rf docs/lib && cp dist/umd/body-muscles.umd.js docs/lib/body-muscles.umd.js && npx serve docs
scripts.docs:build: rm -rf docs/lib && mkdir -p docs/lib && cp dist/umd/body-muscles.umd.js docs/lib/body-muscles.umd.js

author: vulovix
